title: Almond Bruschetta Verity
description: A peppery, tender Ukrainian brunch dish featuring almond paste and marinated bread slices with a light egg-free-friendly dressing.

ingredients.name: Marinade (Olive Oil, Lemon Juice, Dill, Garlic)
ingredients.amount: Enough to cover the almond paste and marinate for at least 30 minutes

instructions: Mix almond paste with marinade and let it sit for at least 30 minutes to infuse flavors.
Slice the rye bread into 6-8 slices of your desired thickness. Brush each slice lightly with olive oil and sprinkle a pinch of salt and pepper on both sides.
Spread a spoonful of almond paste mixture onto the center of each toasted bread slice, spreading it evenly using a spatula or knife.
Place the assembled bruschetta on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 5-7 minutes until the top is lightly golden and warm through.
